title: An Act to Grant the Rockland Port District an Increase in Its Borrowing Capacity and Include Sustainable Aquaculture and Marine Industries in Its Charter
last_house_action: 4/22/2025 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 4/23/2025 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.

actions.description: Committee on Transportation suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on TRANSPORTATION . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on TRANSPORTATION in concurrence
Carried over, in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.
CONSENT CALENDAR - FIRST DAY Under suspension of the rules CONSENT CALENDAR - SECOND DAY. The Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED. Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
Report READ and ACCEPTED, in concurrence. READ ONCE Under suspension of the Rules, READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED , in concurrence. Ordered sent down forthwith.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.
